nasb.text: Flee away, turn back, dwell in the depths, O inhabitants of Dedan, For I will bring the disaster of Esau upon him At the time I punish him.

esv.text: Flee, turn back, dwell in the depths, O inhabitants of Dedan! For I will bring the calamity of Esau upon him, the time when I punish him.

cnv.text: 底但的居民哪！ 你們要轉身逃跑，藏在隱蔽的地方， 因為我懲罰以掃的時候， 必使災禍臨到他身上。

ccb.text: 底但的居民啊， 你们要转身逃命， 藏在深洞里， 因为我必降灾祸惩罚以东。
